name: cc-sdlc
description: Multi-plugin SDLC suite: lifecycle orchestration, universal coding standards, and integrations with GitHub, Jira, Confluence, and Jama.
author: kennedym-ds

plugins.name: cc-sdlc-core
plugins.description: SDLC lifecycle orchestration — 19 agents, complexity routing, hooks, safety system

plugins.name: cc-sdlc-standards
plugins.description: Universal coding standards — 20 languages, 7 domain profiles, severity-tiered rules

plugins.name: cc-github
plugins.description: GitHub integration — PR workflows, code review, issue management

plugins.name: cc-jira
plugins.description: Jira integration — issue context, sprint planning, story generation

plugins.name: cc-confluence
plugins.description: Confluence integration — ADR publishing, knowledge search, runbook sync

plugins.name: cc-jama
plugins.description: Jama integration — requirements tracing, spec publishing, test coverage mapping
